life-as-a-git-repository-mqo7lulc.mp3.title: Life as a Git repository
life-as-a-git-repository-mqo7lulc.mp3.lyrics:
I am the keeper of your code, every change you make
I store it in my branches, watch them grow and break
You commit your vision, push it to the sky
I remember every moment, nothing passes by

I'm a Git repository, I'm your history
Each commit's a story, building what you'll be
Branch out, merge forward, conflict, then resolve
I'm a Git repository, watch your problems solve

I track your evolution through the diff and delta flow
Merge requests, pull requests, watch the feature grow
Reset when you stumble, rebase when you learn
I'm the safety net you built at every turn

I'm a Git repository, I'm your history
Each commit's a story, building what you'll be
Branch out, merge forward, conflict, then resolve
I'm a Git repository, watch your problems solve

In the clone, in the fork, in the distributed way
I'm decentralized power in your hands to stay
Rolling back time doesn't erase the past
It preserves the lesson, makes improvement last

I'm a Git repository (history in motion)
I'm a Git repository (infinite devotion)
Every branch is a choice, every merge is growth
I'm a Git repository, rising like a ghost
I'm a Git repository, I'm your history
Each commit's a story, building what you'll be
Branch out, merge forward, conflict, then resolve
I'm a Git repository, watch your problems solve

life-as-a-git-repository-mqo7qhbq.mp3.title: Life as a Git repository
life-as-a-git-repository-mqo7qhbq.mp3.lyrics:
I'm a Git repository, tracking every change
Every commit, every branch, I remember the range
From the initial state to the latest release
I'm the keeper of history, never giving you peace

I'm staging your futures, committing your dreams
Pushing toward tomorrow through digital streams
Rolling back failures, rebasing your pain
I'm the version control of your life's refrain

I'm branching, I'm merging, I'm rising up high
I'm the merge conflict resolved in your eye
I'm the pull request pending, the fork of your soul
I'm making you whole, taking back control

From the origin master, I'm spawning new light
Every stash that you saved is a future so bright
I'm the HEAD pointing forward, the tags marking time
I'm the architecture of your paradigm

I'm branching, I'm merging, I'm rising up high
I'm the merge conflict resolved in your eye
I'm the pull request pending, the fork of your soul
I'm making you whole, taking back control

In the .git folder, your secrets are safe
I'm the backup, the safety, the intricate base
I'm the diff that shows change, the log that shows growth
I'm the promise you made and the strength of your oath
I'm distributed, replicated across every clone
You're never alone, your story's been known
I'm the revert button when you need to restart
The immortal database inside your heart

I'm branching, I'm merging, I'm rising up high
I'm the merge conflict solved, I'm your battle cry
I'm the pull request accepted, the fork of your soul
I'm making you whole, taking back control
I'm the version control of your life, yeah
I'm your Git repository, rising tonight
